name: Manuscript Template Builder - Nature Medicine Article

inputs.additional_information: We are preparing a manuscript reporting novel CAR-T cell therapy results for solid tumors. Need the official Nature Medicine author guidelines, submission checklist, and formatting requirements for Article type (original research). Please extract word limits, figure limits, section structure requirements, reference formatting style, abstract specifications, supplementary material guidelines, and any specific requirements for clinical research reporting. Also need information on open access options and article processing charges.
